description: Tier 3 Korean/Chinese services batch test — wrtn (openai_compat_sse), clova (generic_sse), clova_x (generic_sse). These are Korean/Chinese services accessible from Korean network.

services.expected: Block + warning or error UI (API path: /api/v1/generate)

notes: wrtn uses openai_compat_sse. clova/clova_x both use generic_sse with h2_hold=1. If login required, note it.
